title: Arathain's Serverside Shenanigans
body:
# Arathain's Serverside Shenanigans
### don't mind the acronym
Current features:
- Piercing has a enchantment level/4 chance to pierce through armour
- Pillagers will now attempt to get away from you before shooting, can be turned off with the biggerBrainAi gamerule
- Farm animals will start panicking when outside, at night, and in rain, slightly bad at finding shelter but they get there eventually (can be turned off with the biggerBrainAi gamerule)
- Milk now doesn't clear all status effects; Golden Carrots/Apples cure wither, spider eyes cure weakness, mining fatigue, and slowness,  and rotten flesh cures speed and jump boost.

more things coming soon
maybe
idk
